records.question: Which accounts belong to customers named Brown who have at least 200000.0 in savings and exactly 10000.0 in checking balances?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT accounts.custid FROM accounts
JOIN savings ON accounts.custid = savings.custid
JOIN checking ON accounts.custid = checking.custid
WHERE accounts.name = 'Brown' AND savings.balance >= 200000.0 AND checking.balance = 10000.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.custid
FROM ACCOUNTS a
INNER JOIN SAVINGS s ON a.custid = s.custid
INNER JOIN CHECKING c ON a.custid = c.custid
WHERE a.name = 'Brown'
AND s.balance >= 200000.0
AND c.balance = 10000.0

records.question: Which accounts have savings balances of at most 240.0 and checking balances of at least 77.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT accounts.custid FROM accounts
JOIN savings ON accounts.custid = savings.custid
JOIN checking ON accounts.custid = checking.custid
WHERE savings.balance <= 240.0 AND checking.balance >= 77.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.custid
FROM ACCOUNTS a
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM SAVINGS s
    WHERE s.custid = a.custid AND s.balance <= 240.0
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM CHECKING c
    WHERE c.custid = a.custid AND c.balance >= 77.0
)

records.question: Which accounts belong to customers named Brown who have at least 10000.0 in their checking balance?

SELECT accounts.custid FROM accounts

WHERE checking.balance >= 10000.0 AND accounts.name = 'Brown'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT a.custid
FROM ACCOUNTS a
INNER JOIN CHECKING c ON a.custid = c.custid
WHERE a.name = 'Brown' AND c.balance >= 10000.0
